title: Module 1: The Foundation
description: Web Development ki duniya me aapka swagat hai. Is module me hum seekhenge ki website banti kaise hai.

chapters.title: 1. HTML, CSS, JS: Rishta Kya Hai?
chapters.content:
Website ek insaan ki tarah hoti hai:

  • HTML (Skeleton): Ye haddiyan hain. Ye batata hai ki page par kya hai (Heading, Photo, Button).
  • CSS (Skin/Clothes): Ye kapde aur rang hain. Ye batata hai ki cheezein kaisi dikhengi (Red color, Center alignment).
  • JavaScript (Brain): Ye dimag hai. Ye cheezon ko kaam karwata hai (Button click hone par kya hoga).
Yaad Rakhein: Bina HTML ke CSS aur JS hawa me hain. HTML sabse zaroori hai.

chapters.title: 2. Linkage: Ye Jude Kaise Hain?
chapters.content:
Aapne 3 files banayi: index.html, style.css, aur script.js. Lekin browser sirf HTML ko padhta hai. To baaki files kaise judti hain?

CSS ko HTML se jodna:

Hum <head> ke andar <link> tag use karte hain.

<link rel='stylesheet' href='style.css'>

Iska matlab: 'Browser bhai, style.css file ko padho aur is page ko sundar banao.'

JS ko HTML se jodna:

Hum <body> ke end me <script> tag use karte hain.

<script src='script.js'></script>

Iska matlab: 'Browser bhai, script.js file ko padho aur dimag chalao.'

chapters.title: 3. Box Model (Dabba Concept)
chapters.content:
Web design me Har Cheez Ek Dabba (Box) Hai.

Chahe wo photo ho, text ho, ya button. Har dabbe ke paas 3 cheezein hoti hain:

  1. Padding: Dabbe ke andar ki hawa (Space inside).
  2. Border: Dabbe ki deewar (Boundary).
  3. Margin: Dabbe ke bahar ki doori (Space outside).
